vocab.meaning: cơ sở hạ tầng dân sự/công cộng
vocab.example: Investing in civic infrastructure like local squares can significantly enhance the quality of life for residents.

vocab.meaning: lá phổi xanh (khu vực nhiều cây xanh trong thành phố)
vocab.example: Our district is becoming overly industrialized, so we desperately need a green lung to purify the air.

vocab.meaning: giảm thiểu hiệu ứng đảo nhiệt đô thị
vocab.example: Expanding public parks is a proven way to mitigate the urban heat island effect in densely populated areas.

vocab.meaning: kết cấu xã hội/mối quan hệ giữa các cá nhân trong cộng đồng
vocab.example: Public spaces serve as the glue that holds the social fabric of a neighborhood together.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn và giải tỏa áp lực
vocab.example: Having a nearby botanical garden would allow people to unwind and decompress after a grueling day at work.
Well-designed public plazas contribute immensely to the overall urban aesthetics of the city.
I am concerned that commercial buildings are starting to encroach on the few remaining open spaces we have.

vocab.meaning: khu vực dành riêng cho người đi bộ
vocab.example: The introduction of a pedestrianized zone would encourage a more active lifestyle among the locals.

vocab.meaning: môi trường hòa nhập (dành cho mọi đối tượng)
vocab.example: Public libraries provide an inclusive environment where individuals from all walks of life can access knowledge.
A lack of public gathering spots can lead to prolonged isolation, especially for the elderly living alone.
